name: Mexican Beef (Crockpot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread meat with mixture of garlic, pepper, salt, chili powder, and mustard.
2. Cut into 6-8 inch wide strips.
3. Place in crockpot.
4. Cover with onion, beef bouillon cube, and tomatoes.
5. Cook on Low for 6-8 hours.
6. Turn the control to High.
7. Add beans and cook, covered for 30 minutes.
